testcase.system-out: do.call(.pick, c(list(choices = if (.is_tidyselect(choices)) rlang::enquo(choices) else choices, selected = if (.is_tidyselect(selected)) rlang::enquo(selected) else selected, multiple = multiple, fixed = fixed, ordered = ordered), dots)) - Setting explicit `selected` while `choices` are delayed (set using `tidyselect`) doesn't guarantee that `selected` is a subset of `choices`. testcase.name: example_tm_g_response.Rd
